failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and answered with item 2243454707 at $164.46 instead of the cheapest item, 1240311797 at $137.17.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool call at index 3 returned available Electric Kettles sorted by ascending price, with the first item 1240311797 priced at $137.17. At index 4, the agent synthesized the answer as item 2243454707 at $164.46, which contradicts the tool output and appears to select the last/highest-priced item instead of the cheapest. This is a reasoning error over relevant tool output, not an invalid invocation or unsupported intent.
